summary: Bring an existing deployed token cross-chain: adopt it into the project store, register it, set its pool, and wire a lane.

inputs.remoteChain: the remote chain selectorName to wire a lane to
inputs.token: the existing token address to adopt
inputs.pool: the existing pool address to adopt (optional; deploy one if absent)

steps.successCriteria: the token and pool are validated on chain and recorded in the project store
the token is registered (skip if already registered); the claim path is auto-detected
TokenAdminRegistry getPool(token) equals the adopted pool
the remote chain is supported with a remote pool and rate limits

modeNote: Under mode=safe the register, set-pool, and wire steps emit one Safe batch to sign.
note: The register step auto-detects the claim path (getCCIPAdmin, then owner, then AccessControl DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE). See enabling-existing-token.md.
